info.description_zh: Vox Royal Corp. 是一家專注於成長型和貴金屬的礦業特許權使用費和串流媒體公司。它擁有涵蓋 7 個司法管轄區的 36 種特許權使用費和串流媒體資產以及 1 種特許權使用權的投資組合。該公司由凱爾·弗洛伊德於2014年1月22日創立，總部位於加拿大安大略省。

info.description: Rigetti Computing, Inc. provides full-stack quantum computing services. It serves global enterprise, government, and research clients through its Rigetti Quantum Cloud Services platform. The company was founded by Chad Rigetti in 2013 and is headquartered in Berkeley, CA.
info.description_zh: RigettiComputing,Inc.提供全端量子運算服務。它透過 Rigetti Quantum 雲端服務平台為全球企業、政府和研究客戶提供服務。該公司由 Chad Rigetti 於 2013 年創立，總部位於加州柏克萊。

info.description: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RGTI ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of Rigetti Computing, Inc. The fund is an actively managed exchange traded fund ("ETF") that attempts to achieve two times (200%) the daily percentage change in the share price of the underlying security by employing derivatives, namely swap agreements and/or listed options contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RGTI ETF 尋求在費用和開支之前達到 Rigetti Computer, Inc. 股價每日百分比變化兩倍 (200%) 的每日投資結果。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金 (“ETF”)，試圖透過使用衍生性商品，即掉期協議和/或上市選擇權合約，實現標的證券股價每日百分比變化兩倍 (200%) 的結果。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Waters Corp. engages in the provision of workflow solutions involving liquid chromatography, mass spectrometry, and thermal analysis. It operates through the Waters and TA (TA Instruments) segments. The Waters segment consists of liquid chromatography instruments, mass spectrometry, and precision chemistry consumable products and services. The TA segment products and services include thermal analysis, rheometry and calorimetry instrument systems, and service sales. The company was founded by James Logan Waters in 1958 and is headquartered in Milford, MA.
info.description_zh: Waters Corp. 提供涉及液相層析、質譜和熱分析的工作流程解決方案。它透過 Waters 和 TA (TA Instruments) 部門運作。沃特世部門包括液相層析儀器、質譜儀以及精密化學消耗品和服務。 TA 部門的產品和服務包括熱分析、流變和量熱儀器系統以及服務銷售。該公司由 James Logan Waters 於 1958 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州米爾福德。

info.description: Novavax, Inc. Is a biotechnology company, which engages in the discovery, development, and commercialization of recombinant vaccines. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Gaithersburg, MD.
info.description_zh: Novavax, Inc.是一家生技公司，從事重組疫苗的發現、開發和商業化。該公司成立於 1987 年，總部位於馬裡蘭州蓋瑟斯堡。

info.description: Freeport-McMoRan, Inc. engages in the mining of copper, gold, and molybdenum. It operates through the following segments: U.S. Copper Mines, South America Operations, Indonesia Operations, Molybdenum Mines, U.S. Rod and Refining, Atlantic Copper, and Corporate and Other. The U.S. Copper Mines segment operates open-pit copper mines in Morenci, Bagdad, Safford, Sierrita, Miami in Arizona and Chino, and Tyrone in New Mexico. The South America Operations segment includes Cerro Verde in Peru and El Abra in Chile. The Indonesia Operations segment handles the operations of the Grasberg minerals district that produce copper concentrate containing significant quantities of gold and silver. The Molybdenum Mines segment includes the Henderson underground mine and Climax open pit mine, both in Colorado. The U.S. Rod and Refining segment consists of copper conversion facilities located in North America and includes refinery and rod mills. The Atlantic Copper segment smelts and refines copper concentrate and markets refined copper and precious metals in slimes. The Corporate and Other segment offers other mining and eliminations, oil and gas operations, and other corporate and elimination items. The company was founded by James R. Moffett on November 10, 1987, and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.description_zh: Freeport-McMoRan, Inc. 從事銅、金和鉬的開採。該公司透過以下部門運作：美國銅礦部門、南美業務部門、印尼業務部門、鉬礦部門、美國棒材和精煉部門、大西洋銅業部門以及企業及其他部門。美國銅礦部門在亞利桑那州的莫倫西、巴格達、薩福德、謝里塔、邁阿密和新墨西哥州的奇諾和蒂龍經營露天銅礦。南美洲業務部門包括秘魯的Cerro Verde 和智利的El Abra。印尼業務部門負責格拉斯伯格礦區的業務，該礦區生產含有大量金和銀的銅精礦。鉬礦部門包括位於科羅拉多州的亨德森地下礦和 Climax 露天礦場。美國棒材和精煉部門由位於北美的銅轉化設施組成，包括精煉廠和棒材軋鋼機。大西洋銅業部門冶煉和精煉銅精礦，並銷售精煉銅和礦泥中的貴金屬。公司及其他部門提供其他採礦和消除、石油和天然氣業務以及其他公司和消除項目。該公司由 James R. Moffett 於 1987 年 11 月 10 日創立，總部位於亞利桑那州菲尼克斯。

info.description: The Estee Lauder Companies, Inc. engages in the manufacture of skin care, makeup, fragrance and hair care products. It sells products under Estee Lauder, Clinique, Origins, MAC, Bobbi Brown, La Mer, Jo Malone London, Aveda and Too Faced. The company was founded by Estee Lauder and Joseph Lauder in 1946 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: 雅詩蘭黛公司從事護膚、化妝品、香水和護髮產品的製造。該公司銷售雅詩蘭黛、倩碧、Origins、MAC、Bobbi Brown、La Mer、Jo Malone London、Aveda 和 Too Faced 品牌的產品。該公司由雅詩蘭黛和約瑟夫蘭黛於 1946 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. engages in the business of acquiring, financing, and owning real estate property. The company was founded on May 10, 2010 and is headquartered in Tustin, CA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 醫療保健設施
info.description_zh: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. 從事收購、融資和擁有房地產業務。該公司成立於2010年5月10日，總部位於加州塔斯汀。

info.description: Corpay, Inc. engages in the provision of digital payment solutions that enable businesses to control purchases and make payments. It operates through the following segments: Vehicle Payments, Corporate Payments, Lodging Payments and Other. The Vehicle Payments segment helps, controls and monitors spending and includes fuel card offerings, tolls and other complementary products. The Corporate Payments segment simplifies and automates vendor payments and includes accounts payable (AP) automation, virtual cards, cross-border payments and purchasing and travel and entertainment (T&E) card products. The Lodging Payments segment helps businesses manage lodging costs, while simplifying the management of hotels and housing, both short and longer-term, while also providing traveler and end customer support. The Other segment includes gift solutions and payroll card solution. It also operates through the following geographical segments: U.S., Brazil and the United Kingdom. The company was founded by William Boatner Reily III and Ronald F. Clarke in 1985 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.
info.description_zh: Corpay, Inc. 致力於提供數位支付解決方案，使企業能夠控制購買和付款。它透過以下部門運作：車輛付款、公司付款、住宿付款和其他。車輛支付部門幫助、控制和監控支出，包括加油卡產品、通行費和其他補充產品。企業支付部門簡化和自動化供應商付款，包括應付帳款 (AP) 自動化、虛擬卡、跨境支付以及採購、旅行和娛樂 (T&E) 卡產品。住宿支付部門幫助企業管理住宿成本，同時簡化短期和長期飯店和住房的管理，同時也為旅客和最終客戶提供支援。其他部分包括禮品解決方案和工資卡解決方案。它還透過以下地理區域開展業務：美國、巴西和英國。該公司由 William Boatner Reily III 和 Ronald F. Clarke 於 1985 年創立，總部位於喬治亞州亞特蘭大。

info.description: Liberty Media Corp. engages in the media and entertainment industries. It operates through the Formula 1 and Other segments. The Formula 1 segment is involved in the global motorsports business that holds exclusive commercial rights with respect to the world championship, an annual, motor race-based competition. The company was founded on March 28, 1991, and is headquartered in Englewood, CO.
info.description_zh: Liberty Media Corp. 從事媒體和娛樂產業。它透過一級方程式和其他部門運作。一級方程式部門涉足全球賽車運動業務，擁有世界錦標賽的獨家商業權，這是一項年度賽車比賽。該公司成立於1991年3月28日，總部位於科羅拉多州恩格爾伍德。

info.description: PTC, Inc. is a global software company. Its products include Windchill, Creo, ThingWorx, Vuforia, Codebeamer, Arbortext, Arena, and Onshape. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Boston, MA.
info.description_zh: PTC, Inc. 是一家全球性軟體公司。其產品包括 Windchill、Creo、ThingWorx、Vuforia、Codebeamer、Arbortext、Arena 和 Onshape。該公司成立於 1985 年，總部位於馬薩諸塞州波士頓。

info.description: FTAI Aviation Ltd. engages in owning, leasing, and servicing commercial jet engines, with a primary focus on CFM56 and V2500 engines. The firm's portfolio of products, including the Module Factory and a joint venture to manufacture engine PMA components, enables cost savings and flexibility for its airline, lessor, and MRO customer base. It operates through the following segments: Aviation Leasing, Aerospace Products, and Corporate and Other. The Aviation Leasing segment owns and manages aviation assets, including aircraft and engines, which it leases and sells to customers. The Aerospace Products segment develops, manufactures, repairs and refurbishes, and sells aircraft engines and aftermarket components for the CFM56-7B, CFM56-5B, and V2500 engines through its maintenance facilities, equity method investments, and exclusivity arrangements. The company is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: FTAI Aviation Ltd. 從事商用噴射引擎的擁有、租賃和維修業務，主要專注於 CFM56 和 V2500 引擎。該公司的產品組合，包括模組工廠和一家製造引擎 PMA 零件的合資企業，為其航空公司、租賃商和 MRO 客戶群實現了成本節約和靈活性。該公司透過以下部門營運：航空租賃部門、航空航太產品部門以及企業及其他部門。航空租賃部門擁有並管理航空資產，包括飛機和發動機，並向客戶租賃和銷售這些資產。航空航太產品部門透過其維修設施、權益法投資和排他性安排，開發、製造、維修和翻新以及銷售 CFM56-7B、CFM56-5B 和 V2500 發動機的飛機發動機和售後零件。該公司總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Hasbro, Inc. engages in the provision of children and family leisure time products and services with a portfolio of brands and entertainment properties. The firm's brands of toys include Power Rangers, Magic: The Gathering, Monopoly, My Little Pony, Nerf, Play-Doh and Transformers. It operates through the following segments: Consumer Products, Wizards of the Coast and Digital Gaming, Entertainment, and Corporate and Other. The Consumer Products segment markets and sells toys and game products around the world. It also promotes brands through the out-licensing of trademarks, characters and other brand and intellectual property rights to third parties, and through the sale of branded consumer products such as toys and apparel. The Wizards of the Coast and Digital Gaming segment promotes the company's brands through the development of trading cards, role-playing and digital game experiences based on Hasbro and Wizards of the Coast properties. The Entertainment segment develops and distributes entertainment content including film, scripted and unscripted television, children's programming, digital content, and live entertainment. The Corporate and Other segment includes the management and administrative services to its principal reporting segments. The company was founded by Henry Hassenfeld and Hilal Hassenfeld in 1923 and is headquartered in Pawtucket, RI.
info.description_zh: Hasbro, Inc. 致力於提供兒童和家庭休閒產品和服務，擁有一系列品牌和娛樂資產。該公司的玩具品牌包括《Power Rangers》、《Magic: The Gathering》、《Monopoly》、《My Little Pony》、《Nerf》、《Play-Doh》和《Transformers》。該公司透過以下部門運作：消費品部門、海岸奇才部門、數位遊戲部門、娛樂部門以及企業及其他部門。消費品部門在世界各地行銷和銷售玩具和遊戲產品。它還透過將商標、人物和其他品牌及智慧財產權授權給第三方，以及透過銷售玩具和服裝等品牌消費品來推廣品牌。 Wizards of the Coast 和數位遊戲部門透過基於 Hasbro 和 Wizards of the Coast 資產開發交易卡、角色扮演和數位遊戲體驗來推廣公司的品牌。娛樂部門開發和發行娛樂內容，包括電影、有劇本和無劇本電視、兒童節目、數位內容和現場娛樂。公司及其他部門包括為其主要報告部門提供管理和行政服務。該公司由 Henry Hassenfeld 和 Hilal Hassenfeld 於 1923 年創立，總部位於羅德島州波塔基特。

info.description: Ascendis Pharma A/S is a biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development of drug candidates. It specializes in its TransCon technologies to develop new therapies that address unmet medical needs. The company was founded by Jan Moller Mikkelsen, Dirk Vetter, and Harald Rau on September 21, 2006 and is headquartered in Hellerup, Denmark.
info.description_zh: Ascendis Pharma A/S 是一家生物製藥公司，從事候選藥物的開發。它專注於 TransCon 技術來開發新療法，以滿足未滿足的醫療需求。該公司由 Jan Moller Mikkelsen、Dirk Vetter 和 Harald Rau 於 2006 年 9 月 21 日創立，總部位於丹麥海勒魯普。

info.description: Lindblad Expeditions Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of expedition cruising and travel services. It operates through the Lindblad and Natural Habitat segments. The Lindblad segment primarily includes sea-based expeditions. The Natural Habitat segment offers land-based, eco-conscious expeditions. The company was founded by Sven-Olof Lindblad on August 9, 2010 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Lindblad Expeditions Holdings, Inc. 从事提供探险巡航和旅行服务。它通过 Lindblad 和 Natural Habitat 部门运营。 Lindblad 部門主要包括海上探險。自然栖息地部分提供陆地、生态意识的探险活动。该公司由 Sven-Olof Lindblad 于 2010 年 8 月 9 日创立，总部位于纽约州纽约市。

info.description: Aeva Technologies, Inc. develops sensing paradigm for autonomous vehicles and robotics. The firm offers drones, robotics, vehicle technology, and virtual and augmented reality products. The company was founded by Soroush Salehian Dardashti and Mina Rezk in 2017 and is headquartered in Mountain View, CA.
info.description_zh: Aeva Technologies, Inc. 為自動駕駛車輛和機器人開發感測範例。該公司提供無人機、機器人、車輛技術以及虛擬和擴增實境產品。該公司由 Soroush Salehian Dardashti 和 Mina Rezk 於 2017 年創立，總部位於加州山景城。

info.description: VSE Corp. is focused on significantly enhancing the productivity and longevity of its customers' high-value, business-critical assets. It operates through the Aviation and Fleet segments. The Aviation segment is a provider of aftermarket parts distribution and MRO services for components and engine accessories supporting commercial, business and general aviation operators. The Fleet segment focuses on the parts distribution, engineering solutions, and mission critical supply chain management services supporting the medium and heavy-duty fleet market. The company was founded in 1959 and is headquartered in Miramar, FL.
info.description_zh: VSE Corp. 致力於大幅提升客戶高價值、業務關鍵型資產的生產力與壽命。它透過航空和機隊部門運作。航空部門是為商業、公務和通用航空業者提供零件和引擎配件的售後零件分銷和 MRO 服務提供者。車隊部門專注於支援中型和重型車隊市場的零件分銷、工程解決方案和關鍵任務供應鏈管理服務。該公司成立於 1959 年，總部位於佛羅裡達州米拉瑪。

info.description: The Trade Desk, Inc. engages in the provision of a self-service and cloud-based ad-buying platform. It operates through the United States and International geographical segments. The firm offers omnichannel advertising, audience targeting, solutions for identity, application programming interface (API), custom, and programmatic, measurement and optimization. The company was founded by Jeffrey Terry Green and David Pickles in November 2009 and is headquartered in Ventura, CA.
info.description_zh: The Trade Desk, Inc. 致力於提供自助服務和基於雲端的廣告購買平台。它透過美國和國際地理部門開展業務。該公司提供全通路廣告、受眾定位、身分解決方案、應用程式介面 (API)、客製化和程式化、測量和優化。該公司由 Jeffrey Terry Green 和 David Pickles 於 2009 年 11 月創立，總部位於加州文圖拉。
